codeReview.summary: The feature is successfully implemented. The worker created packages/shared/vitest.config.ts to include the shared package in the test workspace. The test file packages/shared/src/validators/issue.test.ts already existed with 19 comprehensive test cases covering all required scenarios: allowed transitions (7 tests), blocked transitions (6 tests), same-status edge cases (2 tests), and invalid status handling (2 tests). All tests pass (19/19) and typecheck passes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The test file follows the established Vitest patterns (describe/it/expect) as documented in AGENTS.md. The worker correctly used the standard pattern from other packages.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: packages/shared/src/validators/issue.test.ts uses standard Vitest describe/it/expect patterns matching other test files in the repo

sharedStateObservations.observation: The services.yaml correctly lists the test-shared command as 'pnpm vitest run packages/shared', which was used by the worker.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml contains test-shared: pnpm vitest run packages/shared

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker noted that the issue.test.ts file was pre-existing (created by a prior feature). This indicates proper coordination between dependent features in the milestone.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows worker discovered issue.test.ts already existed with 19 test cases; the actual work was just creating vitest.config.ts

summary: Feature add-issue-validator-tests passes review. The worker successfully created packages/shared/vitest.config.ts which includes the shared package in the test workspace. All 19 tests in packages/shared/src/validators/issue.test.ts pass, covering allowed transitions (backlog->in_progress, todo->in_progress, in_progress->done, etc.), blocked transitions (done->*, cancelled->*, todo->done), same-status edge cases, and invalid status handling. The validation contract requirements VAL-TEST-001, VAL-TEST-002, and VAL-CROSS-001 are all fulfilled.
